name: Kaya Limited
summary: Kaya Limited owns and operates hair and skin care clinics. The company offers solutions in the specialized categories of acne/acne-scar reduction, pigmentation, anti-ageing, laser hair reduction, hair fall, hair transplant and dandruff, and hair health boost, as well as beauty enhancement services. It also provides a range of approximately 80 products covering hair and skin care for men and women. The company sells its products through Kaya clinics; trade outlets; and e-commerce portals, such as Nykaa, Amazon, Flipkart, bigbasket, and Myntra, as well as its website shop.kaya.in. It operates a network of 93 clinics and 900 product retail outlets/touch points in India; and 23 clinics in the Middle East. Kaya Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
